body_txt: Stock Phrase spoken by someone who thought they were out of practice at something, but when doing it again for the first time in a while, find out that they are in fact still good at it. Occasionally subverted, when it first seems that the character has succeeded, but has in fact failed. In martial arts settings, this is likely to lead to getting Back in the Saddle for an individual and/or Order Reborn for an outfit.
